creator: dougb@FreeBSD.org
text:
When installing the latest version I get this:

install  -o root -g wheel -m 444 ports/multimedia/ffmpeg/work/ffmpeg-0.7.13/doc/*.html /usr/local/share/doc/ffmpeg
install: ports/multimedia/ffmpeg/work/ffmpeg-0.7.13/doc/*.html: No such file or directory

Fix: 

Remove *.html from DOC_DOCFILES
How-To-Repeat: 	See above
